The '''"Light Sport" Hunter''' was a typical [[sporting blaster rifle]]. It was a well-balanced, well-built target rifle that could be used equally well right out of the case or after hanging on the wall for years. Like most sporting blaster rifles, it had a longer range but smaller punch than regular [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]].
